## Where I got stuck

- [ ] A command failed.

## Privacy / Safety Check

Confirm before submitting:

- [ ] I did not include real HealthKit sample values or exports.
- [ ] I did not include bearer tokens, token hashes, pairing URLs, setup-page contents, or deep links.
- [ ] I did not include receiver DB dumps, cursor values, or local outbox payloads.
- [ ] I did not include screenshots with health values or identifiable source details.
- [ ] I did not include private receiver hostnames/IPs unless replaced with placeholders.
